proof: function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) > 0 = r2_triangle_ccw(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)

function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) < 0 = r2_right_turn(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)

function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(b, a, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = (r2_triangle_area2(x1, x0, x2) = 0) }(a, b, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = (r2_triangle_area2(x1, x2, x0) = 0) }(c, b, a)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = (r2_triangle_area2(x2, x1, x0) = 0) }(a, b, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = (r2_triangle_area2(x1, x2, x0) = 0) }(a, c, b)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) > 0 = r2_triangle_ccw(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)

function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) > 0 = r2_triangle_ccw(x0, x1, x2) }(r2_translate(a, v), r2_translate(b, v), r2_translate(c, v))
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) < 0 = r2_triangle_cw(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)

function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) < 0 = r2_triangle_cw(x0, x1, x2) }(r2_translate(a, v), r2_translate(b, v), r2_translate(c, v))
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) > 0 = r2_triangle_ccw(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) > 0 = r2_triangle_ccw(x0, x1, x2) }(b, c, a)

function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) < 0 = r2_triangle_cw(x0, x1, x2) }(b, c, a)
r2_triangle_area2(r2_translate(a, v), r2_translate(b, v), r2_translate(c, v)) != r2_triangle_area2(a, b, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, r2_param_line(a, b, t))
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { -r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) = r2_triangle_area2(x0, x2, x1) }(r2_param_line(a, b, t), b, a)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { -r2_triangle_area2(x0, x1, x2) = r2_triangle_area2(x2, x1, x0) }(r2_param_line(a, b, t), b, a)
-r2_triangle_area2(r2_param_line(a, b, t), b, a) != 0
-r2_triangle_area2(r2_param_line(a, b, t), b, a) = 0
